profile_title: M&E Specialist | Grant Writer | International Development Consultant | Tableau · R · Stata
tagline: Available for freelance engagements on Upwork

differentiators.title: Mixed-Methods Fluency
differentiators.description: Rare combination of Stata & R (quantitative) + Dedoose (qualitative) — ideal for rigorous impact evaluations and USAID-compliant M&E.

differentiators.title: Cross-Cultural Field Experience
differentiators.description: 3 continents, 5 sectors — experience with UNHCR, IRC, and BBC Media Action gives context that desk-based consultants simply don't have.

differentiators.title: Recognized Institutional Credentials
differentiators.description: Aspen Institute Fellow, BBC Media Action, BRAC, REACH Initiative — trust signals that matter in competitive, donor-funded environments.

differentiators.title: End-to-End Deliverables
differentiators.description: From needs assessment to final donor report — the full cycle handled so your team doesn't stitch together multiple consultants.

top_services.title: M&E / MEL Framework Design
top_services.description: USAID-aligned monitoring, evaluation & learning frameworks with indicators, data collection tools, and reporting templates.

top_services.title: Grant Writing & Proposals
top_services.description: Full proposals, concept notes, and donor reports for USAID, FCDO, UN agencies, foundations, and private donors.

top_services.title: Research & Statistical Analysis
top_services.description: Mixed-methods research, quantitative analysis (R, Stata), qualitative coding (Dedoose), and data visualization (Tableau).

top_services.title: Needs Assessments
top_services.description: Field-based and desk-based needs assessments for humanitarian response, development programming, and donor due diligence.
